title: Template API Hardware Definition Schema
description: Defines an item of Ratical-supported hardware using the Template API

$schema.description: The schema used for this file

type.description: One of the hardware types supported by the Template API

title.description: The title of the hardware item for UI use

description.description: A description of the hardware item

manufacturer.description: The manufacturer of this hardware item

template.description: TypeScript template for this hardware item (path relative to /src/templates/)

templateOptions.description: Custom template options for this hardware item. These options can be consumed by the template, enabling template reuse for similar hardware items.
